changelog: Migrated from kyc-config.json and kyc-system-config.json to unified format

maintenanceMessage.en: Account opening is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
maintenanceMessage.zh: 开户功能暂时维护中，请稍后再试。
maintenanceMessage.vi: Chức năng mở tài khoản đang bảo trì, vui lòng thử lại sau.
maintenanceMessage.th: ระบบเปิดบัญชีอยู่ระหว่างการบำรุงรักษา กรุณาลองอีกครั้งในภายหลัง
maintenanceMessage.ja: 口座開設は一時的にご利用いただけません。後ほど再度お試しください。
maintenanceMessage.ko: 계좌 개설이 일시적으로 중단되었습니다. 나중에 다시 시도해 주세요.
maintenanceMessage.fr: L'ouverture de compte est temporairement indisponible. Veuillez réessayer plus tard.
maintenanceMessage.es: La apertura de cuenta no está disponible temporalmente. Por favor, inténtelo más tarde.
maintenanceMessage.pt: Abertura de conta temporariamente indisponível. Tente novamente mais tarde.

nameLocal.th: ยังไม่ยืนยัน
ตรวจสอบชีวิต

messageLocal.en: Large withdrawal requires address verification. Please complete address verification to proceed.
messageLocal.zh: 大额提款需要地址证明。请完成地址认证以继续。
messageLocal.vi: Rút tiền lớn yêu cầu xác minh địa chỉ. Vui lòng hoàn thành xác minh địa chỉ để tiếp tục.

messageLocal.en: Withdrawal requires address verification. Please complete address verification to proceed.
messageLocal.zh: 提款需要地址证明。请完成地址认证以继续。
messageLocal.hi: निकासी के लिए पता सत्यापन आवश्यक है। कृपया आगे बढ़ने के लिए पता सत्यापन पूरा करें।

messageLocal.en: Additional verification may be required for large withdrawals.
messageLocal.ja: 大額の出金には追加の確認が必要な場合があります。
